'''鈭歴h-z-n-h''' ('''kashaznehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:worsify|worsify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:worsify|worsify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-z-n-h
|-
! Lemma
| kashaznehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishaznehoko|thishaznehoko]] || [[word:jishaznehoko|jishaznehoko]] || [[word:shishaznehoko|shishaznehoko]] || [[word:kishaznehoko|kishaznehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushaznehoko|thuthushaznehoko]] || [[word:jujushaznehoko|jujushaznehoko]] || [[word:shushushaznehoko|shushushaznehoko]] || [[word:kukushaznehoko|kukushaznehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushaznehoko|thushaznehoko]] || [[word:jushaznehoko|jushaznehoko]] || [[word:shushaznehoko|shushaznehoko]] || [[word:kushaznehoko|kushaznehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshaznehoko|thoshaznehoko]] || [[word:joshaznehoko|joshaznehoko]] || [[word:shoshaznehoko|shoshaznehoko]] || [[word:koshaznehoko|koshaznehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shaznehoko|th忙shaznehoko]] || [[word:j忙shaznehoko|j忙shaznehoko]] || [[word:sh忙shaznehoko|sh忙shaznehoko]] || [[word:k忙shaznehoko|k忙shaznehoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashaznehoko|thashaznehoko]] || [[word:jashaznehoko|jashaznehoko]] || [[word:shashaznehoko|shashaznehoko]] || [[word:kashaznehoko|kashaznehoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
